query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Northern Ireland suffers second night of unrest as rioters attack police
articles.description: Police were pelted with bricks and petrol bombs by balaclava-clad rioters in Co Antrim.

articles.title: Riot police fire water cannon at protesters as second night of Belfast disorder erupts
articles.description: Reports of petrol bombs being thrown at police in latest unrest following Belfast knife attack

articles.title: Equities drop, oil rallies with Iran-US tensions and high inflation in focus
articles.description: MSCI's global equities index fell 1.5% on Wednesday after economic data showed U.S. inflation was high but in line with expectations and oil prices rose as hopes for Middle East peace progress...

articles.title: Economic Jolt: Rising Oil Prices Deepen Selloff Amid Iran-US Tensions
articles.description: Global stock markets experienced a sharp decline as rising oil prices, fueled by heightened Middle East tensions between Iran and the U.S., spurred investor anxiety. MSCI's index fell 1.5%, while oil prices rose following exchange of threats between President Trump and Iran. Inflation concerns further pressured the Federal Reserve's rate decision.

articles.title: Teen arrested after 'savage petrol bomb attack' in Belfast unrest
articles.description: A teenager has been arrested after two police officers were “savagely targeted” with a petrol bomb during rioting in Co Antrim.

articles.title: San Diego inflation is on the rise, but not as much as the U.S. average
articles.description: Gasoline prices were the biggest driver of rising prices

articles.title: Petrol station moguls pay $2 million to creditors after empire collapses, land contaminated
articles.description: The directors of Zoya Investments have agreed to a $2 million settlement to end the liquidator's case against them.

articles.title: Arrest after two police officers ‘savagely targeted’ with petrol bomb
articles.description: An 18-year-old man was arrested following the incident during disorder in Carrickfergus on Tuesday night.

articles.title: Another sell-off for AI stocks knocks Wall Street back to where it was 5 weeks ago
articles.description: Another sell-off for artificial-intelligence stocks dragged the U.S. market sharply lower. The S&P 500 dropped 1.6% Wednesday for its first back-to-back drop in three weeks and is back to where it was in early May. The Dow Jones Industrial Average tumbled 953 points, and the Nasdaq composite led the market lower with a 2% slide. Wall Street has been shaky since last week, when AI stocks went from roaring to records to suddenly turning lower. Among the worries is that their prices have simply shot too high, too fast. Oil prices rose after President Donald Trump threatened more strikes on Iran.

articles.title: Inflation report comes in hot
articles.description: Rising gas prices pushed inflation to its highest level in three years last month, a headache for the Federal Reserve and a potential political challenge for the Trump administration as midterm elections near.
